calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald appeared for plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners, a partnership doing business in California.
No appearance by defendant Steven Brazius, an individual.
Amended Default was entered against defendant on December 19, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 13, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on February 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners, a partnership doing business in California, and against the Defaulted Defendant Steven Brazius, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $28,593.96.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,406.07.
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $394.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,194.03.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Continued To Apr-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Continued To Jun-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
